SEARCH
Package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands

Class TGWands

java.lang.Object
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.TGWands
public class TGWands extends Object
The main mod class for TGWands.

Responsible for registering all mod items, blocks, entities, creative tabs, and configurations. Also handles lifecycle events like common setup and server starting.

Since:
0.1.0

  • Constructor Details

    • TGWands

      public TGWands(net.neoforged.bus.api.IEventBus modEventBus, net.neoforged.fml.ModContainer modContainer)
      TGWands mod constructor.

      Registers all deferred objects, event listeners, and configurations.

      Parameters:
      modEventBus - the mod event bus
      modContainer - the mod container
